title: AquaFunded Special Offer: 40% OFF + 120% Refund
description: Take your trading to the next level with a 40% discount on all AquaFunded challenges. Use code AQUA40 to save and get a 120% refund on your fees.
seo_content:
AquaFunded 40% OFF Deal

AquaFunded is offering a verified 40% flat discount on all trading challenges with code AQUA40. This deal covers every account tier from the $5K Sea Horse all the way to the $200K Whale, making it accessible to traders at every level. On top of the discount, you also benefit from a 120% fee refund on your first funded payout — adding extraordinary value on top of the initial savings.

AquaFunded is a forex-focused prop trading firm that has built a strong reputation for reliable payouts, trader-friendly conditions, and multi-platform support. The firm operates challenge-based evaluations designed to identify consistently profitable traders and provide them with real capital to trade. Their structured account tiers — named after ocean creatures — reflect the firm's identity and scale up to $200,000 in maximum challenge size.

With code AQUA40, the pricing becomes highly competitive: the $25K Ray Challenge drops to $141, the $50K Dolphin Challenge to $206, the $100K Shark Challenge to $336, and the $200K Whale Challenge to $648. The 120% refund policy then ensures that on your first payout, you recover more than your original fee, making the total net cost of evaluation effectively negative over time.

AquaFunded supports a 90% profit split for funded traders, with platforms including MT5, cTrader, and TradeLocker. The firm's challenge rules include a maximum daily loss limit and overall drawdown limit with no artificial time pressure. Trading styles including scalping, news trading (within defined windows), and algorithmic strategies are generally supported across their account tiers.

To claim this deal, use the affiliate link above to reach AquaFunded, select your preferred challenge account size, and enter AQUA40 at the checkout page. The 40% discount is applied immediately. Note that this offer was set with an expiry of April 1, 2026 — verify current availability on the AquaFunded website before purchasing.

youtube_metadata.title: AquaFunded Coupon AQUA40 | 40% OFF Discount & 120% Refund
youtube_metadata.description: Save 40% on all AquaFunded challenges using the exclusive code AQUA40. Plus, enjoy a 120% fee refund on your first payout. Verified current deal.
